ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the company's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company operates in */,
  "revenue_range" TEXT /* Revenue range of the company */,
  "employee_range" TEXT /* Employee range of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., public, private, non-profit) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* City and country of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for public companies */,
  "num_funding_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of funding rounds (for startups) */,
  "total_funding" REAL /* Total funding amount (for startups) */,
  "last_funding_round_date" TEXT /* Date of the last funding round (for startups) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical industry classification) */,
  "industry_size" INTEGER /* Number of companies in the industry */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_parent_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "primary_location" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the primary location for the company */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_history" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the revenue */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the revenue data */,
  "revenue_amount" REAL /* Revenue amount for the year */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the revenue amount */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue data (e.g., annual report, SEC filing) */,
  "revenue_growth" REAL /* Percentage growth in revenue compared to the previous year */,
  "quarterly_data" TEXT /* Quarterly revenue data (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_history" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the employee data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the employee data */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees for the year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the employee data (e.g., annual report, company website) */,
  "employee_growth" REAL /* Percentage growth in employee count compared to the previous year */,
  "quarterly_data" TEXT /* Quarterly employee count data (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "primary_contact" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the primary contact for the company */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* LinkedIn URL of the contact */,
  "twitter_url" TEXT /* Twitter URL of the contact */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the financial data */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial data */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the fiscal year */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the fiscal year */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets for the fiscal year */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities for the fiscal year */,
  "equity" REAL /* Equity for the fiscal year */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow for the fiscal year */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial data */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin as a percentage */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin as a percentage */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt to equity ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the award information */,
  "award_level" TEXT /* Level of the award (e.g., national, international) */,
  "award_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the award image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_awards_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., company website, review site) */,
  "review_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "review_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Reply to the review (if any) */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_reviews_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user is associated with */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the company profile */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the company profile was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the company profile */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership entry */,
  "company_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first company in the partnership */,
  "company_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second company in the partnership */,
  "partnership_type" TEXT /* Type of partnership (e.g., strategic, joint venture) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the partnership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the partnership */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the partnership */,
  "partnership_status" TEXT /* Status of the partnership (e.g., active, expired, pending) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date for partnership renewal */,
  "partnership_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the partnership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_partnerships_company_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("company_id_1") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_partnerships_company_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("company_id_2") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "competitor_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competitor company */,
  "competition_level" TEXT /* Level of competition (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the competition */,
  "competitor_status" TEXT /* Status of the competition (e.g., active, dormant) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the competition data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_competitors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_competitors_competitor_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
